scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n node,deploy,server,frontend -c blue,yellow,green,magenta "npm run dev:node" "npm run dev:deploy" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:server: node scripts/wait-for-deploy.js && cd certchain-server && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd certchain-contract && npm install && cd ../certchain-server && npm install && cd ../certchain-frontend && npm install
